items.name: bundle of reed pith
items.description: Dried pith cut from marsh reeds. Weaves into a wick, a splint, or a spell that listens to water.

items.name: flask of eel oil
items.description: Dark oil rendered from eels, prized in the reed markets. It slicks a lock, soothes a joint, or greases an escape.

items.name: handful of memory silt
items.description: Grey silt from the drowned mill, said to hold the shape of names pressed into it.

items.name: eelglass bead
items.description: A cloudy green bead of eelglass that briefly shows who needs a thing most. Component, curio, or quiet gift.

items.name: reed-woven vest
items.description: A supple vest woven from oiled reeds. Light, quiet, and it floats — which has saved more than one ferry passenger.

items.name: eelglass seeing-lens
items.spellBias: seeing need, water-memory, what is hidden below
items.description: A lens ground from eelglass that clouds and clears with the tide. Focused, it turns a spell toward what people need and hide.

modifier.focusBias: hidden need, water-memory, what lies beneath

items.name: bog-iron ferry hook
items.description: A long bog-iron hook for hauling punts to the oath-posts. It pulls a boat, a body, or an argument closer.

items.name: oath-post splinter charm
items.description: A splinter of a ferry oath-post bound in wire. The marsh holds oaths made near it; the charm holds a little of that weight.

items.name: patched marsh waders
items.description: Tall patched waders that keep the reeds and the cold water out. Surefooted where others sink.

items.name: marsh febrifuge
items.spellBias: breaking fever, marsh herbs, patient healing
items.description: A bitter green draught the reed-healers brew against marsh fever. It breaks a fever and steadies a shaking hand.

items.name: string of smoked eel
items.description: Fat smoked eel on a reed string, the marsh's staple travel food and favourite small gift.

items.name: carved bone pet-whistle
items.description: A whistle carved for calling and calming Hollowmere's kept creatures. Beloved of keepers, useful to anyone near a frightened animal.

items.name: creature care slate
items.description: A wax-slate of care instructions for some specific animal: what it eats, what frightens it, whose it is.

items.name: notched ferry token
items.spellBias: passage, a promised crossing, debt to the ferry
items.description: A bog-iron token notched for one crossing. Proof of a passage owed, and a small key to the ferry's goodwill.
